***Christian Windfeld*** - Drums ***Libero Mureddu*** - Piano, Synth ***Valerie Westlake-Klein*** - Movement, Performance ----------- ***Peter Hebert*** – Double Bass ***Karen Schlimp*** – Piano ***Corinna Eikmeier*** – Cello ----------- ***Yves Senden*** - Piano ***Adaya MalkaPeled*** - Voice ***Will Bracken*** - Piano ----------- ***Bert Mooiman*** - Organ ***Vlady Bystrov*** - Alto Saxophone ***Anne-Liis Poll*** - voice ----------- ***Jeroen Malaise*** - Piano ***Anto Pett*** - Piano ----------- ***Nicola Leonard Hein*** – Buchla Music Easel, SAB ***Richard Barrett*** – Live-Electronics ***Arnas Mikalkėnas*** – Drums ----------- ***Pedro González Fernández*** - Violin, Live-Electronics ***Santiago Quintans*** - Electric Guitar ***Gerardo Gozzi*** - Saxophones
